behavior_surfaces: server workflow template registry default list behavior
workflow template CRUD and import-preview API
workflow template validation and reserved-id handling
workflow authoring guide and tool duplicate-template behavior
state_contracts: No builtin workflow template is registered or exposed by default.
User-created and imported workflow templates remain the supported creation/start path.
The former builtin id agent-development is no longer reserved and may be used by user/imported templates.
Legacy builtin source recognition remains for compatibility with older persisted session metadata.
Import preview only reports a conflict for agent-development when a user template with that id already exists.

verification.command: cd desktop; bun run test src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx src/pages/EmptySession.test.tsx src/api/sessions.test.ts

verification.result: 98 files passed, 861 tests passed, typecheck and Vite build pass
no whitespace errors; Windows LF/CRLF conversion warnings only

known_unknowns: Full bun run verify was not run in this pass; the narrower server and desktop gates covering the touched surfaces passed.
Manual browser smoke was not run; desktop build and same-area component tests passed.
Project cognition entry readiness was review/partial_refresh, so live reads and tests are the source of truth for implementation claims.
confidence_notes: The change removes default builtin registration instead of deleting user/imported template persistence.
Compatibility source enums retain builtin handling so older persisted session metadata can still be read.
Quality smoke now provisions its own user workflow template rather than depending on a default builtin preset.
user_decisions: User requested removing builtin workflow templates because builtin workflows are hard to customize.
User wants workflows to be created by the user or imported from others.

boundary.scope: Remove builtin workflow template availability and builtin id reservation from active registry/API/authoring/smoke/test surfaces.
excluded: Removing legacy builtin source type compatibility
Deleting or migrating user workflow templates
